narrative:
Precinct Wapakoneta 4A (precinct in Auglaize County) has 489 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.3 percentage points.
